title: Iran's Army warns U.S. it will open 'new fronts' if war resumes — Akraminia admits ceasefire used to rebuild military
snippet: Iran Army spokesman Brigadier General Mohammad Akraminia warned the United States that Iran will open 'new fronts' if hostilities resume. In a striking admission, Akraminia stated that 'the Islamic Republic's army has treated the ceasefire period as a time of war and used the opportunity to strengthen its combat power.' The statement signals Iran's military posture during the ceasefire has been one of active rearmament rather than de-escalation, and that Tehran is prepared to escalate geographically if the conflict resumes. The warning comes amid Trump's 2-3 day ultimatum deadline and rising tensions over the collapse of diplomatic progress.
tag_reason: 신규 — 이란군 대변인의 '새로운 전선' 경고와 휴전 기간 군사력 증강 인정은 새로운 정보. 이란의 공식적 재무장 인정은 이전에 보도되지 않은 사건
